targets.organisation: Queen's University Belfast Knowledge Transfer Partnerships
targets.source_evidence: Queen's presents KTPs as structured collaborations between academic institutions and businesses; Queen's KTP news pages list ktp@qub.ac.uk as a contact route.
targets.ask: Can Queen's assess whether it can lead or route an AKT6 / KTP-style validation sprint for Aureon Evidence OS with R&A as the business partner?
required_reply_evidence: timeline feasibility before the 2026-07-15 AKT6 close

targets.contact_route: Amanda Fullerton, a.fullerton@ulster.ac.uk, +44 28 7167 5074; Paul Gilpin, p.gilpin@ulster.ac.uk, +44 28 7012 4063
targets.source_evidence: Ulster KTP page lists Amanda Fullerton and Paul Gilpin as Knowledge Transfer contacts and says Ulster has a strong KTP track record.
targets.ask: Can Ulster assess whether it can lead or support an AKT6 validation sprint around Aureon Evidence OS for controlled AI workflow assurance?
required_reply_evidence: academic owner or research group fit

targets.contact_route: Business Support Team 0800 181 4422 or enquiry form
targets.source_evidence: Invest NI says interested businesses can contact its Business Support Team or enquiry form for Innovate UK KTP support.
targets.ask: Can Invest NI route R&A to a suitable Northern Ireland knowledge base for a rapid AKT6/KTP-style validation sprint?

targets.contact_route: Connected NI / Belfast Met business support route
targets.source_evidence: Connected NI lists Belfast Met support including Knowledge Transfer Partnership, Innovation Vouchers and InnovateUs support.
targets.ask: Can Belfast Met advise whether its knowledge-transfer or innovation support route can fit Aureon Evidence OS validation?
required_reply_evidence: best next funding route if AKT6 is not viable

targets.contact_route: Contact form / Head Office Unit 1 Oakbank, Channel Commercial Park, Queens Road, Belfast, BT3 9DT
targets.source_evidence: Artemis describes clean maritime vessels and technology and provides a contact form and Belfast head office; Artemis is also reported as lead partner of Belfast Maritime Consortium.
targets.ask: Can Artemis assess whether Aureon can support CMDC7 evidence automation, assurance, trial evidence, or deployment reporting in a maritime consortium?

targets.source_evidence: Belfast Harbour publishes contact details and states net-zero/partnership aims; public reports also describe Belfast Harbour clean maritime and port decarbonisation work.
targets.ask: Can Belfast Harbour advise whether there is a port decarbonisation or clean-maritime demonstration context where Aureon could provide evidence assurance?
required_reply_evidence: asset owner or maritime lead referral

targets.source_evidence: Harland & Wolff contact page lists Navantia UK contact details; Navantia describes the Belfast shipyard as central to a major modernisation programme.
targets.ask: Can Navantia UK / Harland & Wolff advise whether there is a clean-maritime trial, feasibility, or deployment evidence-assurance role suitable for CMDC7?

targets.source_evidence: CATAGEN describes a Clean Maritime Demonstrator Competition consortium with partners including Belfast Harbour and provides a contact route.
targets.ask: Can CATAGEN advise whether Aureon evidence automation could support clean-maritime fuel, port, or vessel evidence packs for a CMDC7 route?

controls: Public targets are lead-acquisition candidates, not partner commitments.
No external email, contact form, partner invitation, portal upload, or IFS submission was performed.
A target reply must supply route-specific lead, asset, permission, budget or work-package evidence before any IFS portal action.
Do not mark AKT6 or CMDC7 submit-ready from this register alone.
